title: アルダンからは逃げ切れない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking by the academy gate after classes
when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right, classes are over! Time for some
karaoke! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Do you have a moment, Palmer? You appear to
be... unwell.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what are you talking about? I feel awesome!
Wahey!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You can't pull the wool over my eyes. You should
stay in today and rest up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Umm, but I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Is there some reason you absolutely need to go to
karaoke?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You sure are perceptive, huh, Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Actually, the whole idea of today's karaoke
meetup is to cheer up this one student who lost a
race recently.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It wouldn't be good for her to just stay mopey
forever, right? That's why I wanted to help get her
back on track.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That's all the more reason not to go. Have you
thought about what would happen if you were to
make her sick too?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And even if you feel fine now, it's not uncommon
for people to break out into a fever at night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: All right, fine...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'll go to karaoke in your stead and take it upon
myself to enliven the atmosphere.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Say what now?! I totally need to see that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
No, what you need is to go to bed and rest. And
don't forget to stay hydrated.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If you start to feel any chills coming on, it means
your fever is worsening, so try to stay warm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Conversely, if you grow too hot, be sure to wipe
away any sweat and change into lighter clothing
so your body heat can escape.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While watching the two of them—Ardan readily
giving advice, and Palmer listening quietly—I
suddenly blurt out...
choice_data_list:
You're very knowledgeable about treatment
methods, Ardan.

You're very knowledgeable about treatment
methods, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While watching the two of them—Ardan readily
giving advice, and Palmer listening quietly—I
suddenly blurt out...
choice_data_list:
You're very knowledgeable about treatment
methods, Ardan.

You're very knowledgeable about treatment
methods, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you for the compliment. I suppose
it's due to having a wealth of experience with this
sort of thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Though that's not really something to boast
about.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's not true at all! Everything you told me is
gonna be a massive help!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I do hope so. Never hesitate to come to me if
you're feeling under the weather.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha, thanks! I'll show you I can outrun this
sickness, no sweat!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And once I've recovered, we can celebrate with a
round of karaoke, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Certainly. Let's make it a rousing time. I shall
show you just how brilliantly I shine. ♪
